title: Dashboard enhancements and bug fixes
body:
* **Import BI files (Public Preview)**: Importing Power BI and Tableau reports as AI/BI dashboards with Genie Code is in Public Preview. See [Import BI files using Genie Code](/aws/en/dashboards/manage/import-bi).
* **Image widget**: You can now add a dedicated image widget to a dashboard. See [Image widgets](/aws/en/dashboards/manage/visualizations/image-widgets).
* **Multi-select filter improvements**: [Multi-select filter](/aws/en/dashboards/manage/filter-types#multiple-values) improvements:

  + **Multi-select filter stays open**: Multi-select filter drop-downs now stay open between selections and keep your place in the list instead of closing.
  + **Select all matching values in a multi-select filter**: In a multi-select filter, you can now type to narrow the list and select **Select all results** to select every matching value at once. Selections are additive across searches.
* **Dashboard variable display names**: When a display name is available, dashboard variable drop-down menu options show the column's display name instead of the field name. To learn more about variables, see [Create a dashboard variable](/aws/en/dashboards/manage/filters/dashboard-variables#create-a-dashboard-variable).
* **Cross-filtering text-selection fix**: Fixed a bug where selecting text in a table unintentionally triggered cross-filtering.
* **Genie Code for dashboard authoring (GA)**: Genie Code for dashboard authoring, the Genie agent built for authoring dashboards, is now generally available. See [Use Genie Code for dashboard authoring](/aws/en/dashboards/manage/dashboard-agent). This release also adds the following authoring capabilities:

  + **Author image widgets with Genie Code**: Genie Code for dashboard authoring can now add image widgets to a dashboard. See [Author image widgets](/aws/en/dashboards/manage/dashboard-agent#image-widgets).
  + **Beautify dashboards with Genie Code**: Genie Code for dashboard authoring can now redesign a dashboard's appearance. Ask it to beautify your dashboard, then undo the changes if you want to revert. See [Beautify a dashboard](/aws/en/dashboards/manage/dashboard-agent#beautify).
